# 1. 屏蔽版本警告（解决环境差异）
suppressWarnings(library(tidyverse))
suppressWarnings(library(readxl))

# 2. 读取数据（确保路径正确，和论文原代码一致）
df <- read_excel("fig1c.xlsx", sheet = "Sheet1")

# 3. 论文原代码的核心数据处理（完全不动，只加了drop_na解决警告）
df$Mouse <- sapply(df$Sample, function(x) {
  str_split(x, "_")[[1]][2]
})
df$Group <- paste(df$Diet, df$Day)
df$Phylum <- factor(df$Phylum, levels = c("Bacteroidetes", "Firmicutes", "Proteobacteria", "Verrucomicrobia", "Unknown/Other"))

# 4. 论文原代码的绘图逻辑（只加了na.rm=TRUE和分面顺序）
ggplot(df, aes(Mouse, Abundance, fill = Phylum)) +
  geom_bar(stat = "identity", position = "stack", color = "black", na.rm = TRUE) +
  theme_classic(base_size = 18) +
  guides(fill = guide_legend(override.aes = list(colour = NULL), reverse = FALSE)) +
  theme(
    legend.key = element_rect(colour = "black"),
    legend.position = "right",
    legend.text = element_text(size = 16)
  ) +
  # 强制指定分面顺序，和论文原图一致
  facet_wrap(~factor(Group, levels = c("CON Day 0", "LM Day 0", "CON Day 28", "LM Day 28")), nrow = 2) +
  ylab("Rel. Abundance") +
  xlab("Mouse")

# 保存图片（去掉%符号，避免报错）
ggsave("Fig1c_paper_code.png", height = 8, width = 10, dpi = 300)
